summary:
To find the lower limit of the average IOP at which it will occur within 95%, one uses the mean minus two standard deviations; thus, this results in about 28 mm Hg as the threshold observed most frequently among these cases. Agent concluded by selecting choice 'B' representing near approximation around computed result. 

The summary captures essential statistics used while addressing core query related directly towards understanding typical range expectations based upon provided parameters concerning patient population’s eye pressures under consideration here.
